sentence_window:
Opening of the issue
201. (1)Subject to the compliance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, a public issue
may be opened:
a) within twelve months from the date of issuance of the observations by the Board under
regulation 6; or (2) an issue shall be opened after at least three working days from the date of registering the
prospectus with the Registrar of Companies.
Minimum subscription 202. (1) The minimum subscription to be received in the issue shall be at least ninety per cent.
